overall.description: Static shot of a medieval tavern interior featuring Gothic stone arches, wooden tables, and warm candlelight. A robed NPC walks through the hall while other patrons sit at tables. High-quality game engine footage with atmospheric lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric gaze across a medieval tavern interior defined by Gothic stone arches and warm candlelight. It begins with a wide view of the hall, where patrons are seated at heavy wooden tables amidst the ambient glow of the architecture. As the scene unfolds, a robed figure emerges from the background, moving steadily across the frame toward the right. The camera remains stationary throughout, allowing the subtle movement of the figure to contrast with the stillness of the stone surroundings before the sequence concludes.
